query: heavy film grain noise analog photograph high ISO texture
message: sub:film_artifacts/grain — anti_aesthetic — heavy grain, high-ISO noise, push-processed analog texture

response.objective_caption: A grayscale image showing a human face viewed through a textured, translucent surface covered in small water droplets or condensation. The face appears behind the surface in the right portion of the frame, with only vague suggestions of eye, nose, and mouth shapes visible. Bright light emanates from the upper left corner, creating a diffuse glow across the surface. The droplets catch light and cast tiny specular highlights across the entire frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, low-contrast grayscale image of a human face pressed behind a condensation-covered translucent surface, rendered with intentional soft focus that dissolves all fine detail into mushy ambiguity. The obscured cropping withholds the full face, while the oppressive crushed midtones and suffocating atmosphere evoke dread and unease. The abstract quality of the dissolved features and dreamlike separation between viewer and subject create atmospheric distress through a surreal, emotionally unsettling veil of obscurity.
